chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D-703 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case. 07-08-2024. Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan advocate for respondent No. 4 to 6. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, AAG, Sindh. ******** The statement has been filed on behalf of respondents No. 4 to 6, which is taken on record. Learned counsel for respondents Nos. 4 to 6 submits that leave encashment of the petitioner is prepared and will be handed down to the petitioner on 15-08-2024, while the gratuity/commutation amount would be paid in two equal installments, the first installment to be paid on 15-09-2024 and second one on 30-10-2024, the counsel for the petitioner concedes the above suggestion. With these conditions, the petition stands disposed of with mutual consent. Judge Judge Nasim/P.A
